title: Micro Hot Wheels
summary: Micro Hot Wheels is a series of miniature Hot Wheel cars that came out in 1989 to compete with the newest phenomenon of diecast toys "Micro Machines". They are the first series for Hot Wheels to venture into making cars smaller than their usual 1:64 scale. After the series ended within a year (or two?...

title: Leeway Chang
summary: Leeway Chang is a Hot Wheels staff designer specializing in graphics design who has worked at Mattel since 2007. Born in Taiwan, but spent most of his childhood in Latin America, Leeway traveled extensively before he settled in Southern California....

title: Bash-Ups
summary: Bash-Ups is a short line of Hot Wheels Monster Trucks in 2019 - 2021 which are big scale trucks that would be destroyed (or bashed) if they wreck into anything. They could be put back together and set off to be bashed again. Some trucks reappeared in different years.

title: List of 2026 Hot Wheels (by Series)
